realtor_association_membership.present_member_other_association_names: Greater Hartford Association of REALTORS; Connecticut REALTORS

speaking__language_information.areas_of_expertise_line_1: First-time homebuyer education in New Haven and Middlesex counties, including walking clients through financing options (FHA, CHFA, and conventional), realistic budgeting, and understanding closing costs, based on hands-on experience running monthly buyer workshops since 2018.
speaking__language_information.areas_of_expertise_line_2: Digital marketing strategies for small real estate and affiliate businesses—especially how lenders, inspectors, and stagers can use social media, neighborhood-focused content, and email campaigns to build referral relationships with local REALTORS and consumers.
speaking__language_information.areas_of_expertise_line_3: Community outreach and relationship-building with bilingual and first-generation homebuyers, including partnering with local nonprofits, churches, and neighborhood associations to host info sessions and Q&A nights tailored to Spanish-speaking families.
